description: Seasonal holiday activities — fall festivals, winter markets, spring blooms, and summer beach days.

ideas.title: Pumpkin Patch & Carving Night
ideas.description: Visit a local pumpkin patch in autumn to pick your own pumpkins, then head home for a carving competition with scoring categories: scariest, most creative, and most technically impressive. Set out candles and apple cider while you work and let the loser do the dishes. A classic fall date that never gets old.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: seasonal_01] Two cartoon characters at a kitchen table lit by three carved glowing jack-o-lanterns, carving tools in hand mid-contest. Apple cider mugs steam beside them, autumn leaves press against the darkened window, and a 'Judge's Scoring' card sits between the pumpkins. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition. The aesthetic should be modern, professional, and visually engaging, suitable for high-end educational animation.

ideas.title: Holiday Lights Drive with Hot Cocoa
ideas.description: Pre-load a route of the best holiday light displays in your area, make a big thermos of homemade hot cocoa with all the toppings, and spend an evening driving through neighborhoods judging the displays. Create a scoring rubric — most lights, best theme, most over-the-top — and declare a neighborhood winner together.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: seasonal_02] Two cartoon characters in a car at night, windows down, surrounded by an explosion of colorful holiday light displays from neighboring houses. A thermos of hot cocoa sits between them on the console and both hold scorecards to rate each display. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition. The aesthetic should be modern, professional, and visually engaging, suitable for high-end educational animation.

ideas.title: Winter Market & Mulled Wine Date
ideas.description: Attend a local holiday market or Christmas market bundled up in your warmest layers. Sip mulled wine as you browse handmade goods, sample seasonal foods, and listen to live music. Make a rule: each person must buy the other one small, meaningful gift from the vendors — under $15 budget.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: seasonal_03] Two cartoon characters bundled in colorful scarves and woolly hats at a snow-dusted winter market, holding steaming mugs of mulled wine. Handmade goods — pottery, candles, knitwear — fill the stalls behind them under warm glowing market lights. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition. The aesthetic should be modern, professional, and visually engaging, suitable for high-end educational animation.

ideas.title: Apple Orchard Day Trip
ideas.description: Drive to a local apple orchard in early autumn for pick-your-own apples, fresh cider doughnuts, and a hayride if available. Back home, use your harvest to bake an apple pie or crumble together from scratch. The whole day — road trip, orchard, and baking — makes for a perfectly complete fall experience.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: seasonal_04] Two cartoon characters in an apple orchard under trees heavy with bright red and green apples, baskets overflowing. One holds a fresh cider doughnut and both grin enormously. A hayride cart is visible waiting in the golden afternoon light behind them. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition. The aesthetic should be modern, professional, and visually engaging, suitable for high-end educational animation.

ideas.title: Summer Beach Sunset Picnic
ideas.description: Pack a cooler with cold drinks, fruit, cheese, and charcuterie and time your arrival at the beach or lake for 90 minutes before sunset. Swim or wade, then settle into chairs or a blanket as the light changes. Stay until the stars come out and the temperature drops enough to share a jacket.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: seasonal_05] Two cartoon characters on a beach at golden hour, toes in warm sand, a cooler of cold drinks and a charcuterie spread between them. A dramatic sunset sky — deep orange, pink, and violet — reflects perfectly on the wet shoreline. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition. ideas.title: Spring Cherry Blossom or Wildflower Walk
ideas.description: Research the peak bloom dates for cherry blossoms, wildflowers, or tulips in your region and plan a morning walk specifically around that window. Bring a camera, take your time, and bring a blanket for a picnic among the blooms. The ephemeral beauty of peak bloom makes this inherently romantic — it only lasts a week.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: seasonal_06] Two cartoon characters walking beneath a breathtaking tunnel of blooming cherry blossom trees, pink petals swirling around them. One holds a camera while the other lays out a picnic blanket on a path carpeted in fallen blossoms. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition. ideas.title: Autumn Foliage Scenic Drive
ideas.description: Time a weekend drive to the peak of fall foliage in your region — state tourism websites often publish weekly color reports. Pack a picnic and plan one or two roadside stops to walk among the trees. The colors, the cool air, and the open road make this one of the most effortlessly beautiful date formats of the year.

A picnic basket is visible in the back seat and both characters look out in pure wide-eyed awe. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. ideas.title: Ice Skating Rink Date
ideas.description: Visit an outdoor or indoor ice rink during the winter season, rent skates, and spend an hour holding each other upright as you circle the ice. Even if one of you is a disaster on skates, that's entirely the point — the stumbling, the steadying, and the laughter is the date. Finish with hot chocolate at the rinkside café.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: seasonal_08] Two cartoon characters on an outdoor ice rink at night, one helping the other up after a spectacular fall, both laughing. Fairy lights and evergreen garlands ring the rink and a hot cocoa stand glows warmly just behind the barrier. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. ideas.title: Summer Outdoor Movie Night
ideas.description: Set up a projector and sheet in the backyard, fill a cooler with drinks, make popcorn on the stovetop with creative toppings, and watch a film under the open sky. String fairy lights around the space and lay out blankets. Alternatively, find a free outdoor cinema screening in a local park and bring your own snack setup.

A popcorn bowl with colorful toppings sits between them and fireflies blink in the warm evening air. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. ideas.title: Spring Farm-to-Table Cooking Day
ideas.description: Visit a local farm stand or u-pick strawberry or vegetable farm in spring, load up on fresh seasonal produce, then head home to cook an entirely farm-fresh meal together. Look up recipes using only what you bought and make it up as you go. Eating food you picked and cooked the same day is a deeply satisfying and grounding experience.
